examples: Guava is an obscure tropical fruit that's subtly acidic, with the sweetness that intensifies as you eat your way to the center.
Yet rather than the to-be-expected socialist harangue, Allende subtly works her political message within the fabric of the compelling narrative she weaves.
Although I believe taxes will go up, I also believe it will be done subtly.
And shifting parties will subtly change the thinking of even such an independent as Mr Specter.
